name: Tianneng Power International Limited
summary: Tianneng Power International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production of motive batteries in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its products include high-end eco-friendly batteries for use in electric vehicles, special electric vehicles, start-stop systems in automobiles, and energy storage backup applications; lead batteries for mini electric vehicles; start-stop batteries for starting, ignition, and lighting of vehicles and equipment, such as automobiles, motorcycles and fuel engines; special electric vehicle batteries for use in freight equipment, including electric forklifts, stackers, and lift trucks; energy storage lead batteries for electric generators to store energy; and backup batteries for use in power transmission stations. The company also offers lithium-ion batteries for light, passenger, and commercial electric vehicles, as well as consumer electronic products and energy storage; fuel cells; and lead metals, nickel-ion compounds, and cobalt-ion compounds. The company also manufactures and sells lead-acid batteries and battery related accessories, recycled batteries, and electrode plates; sells metal materials; and trades in new energy materials. Tianneng Power International Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
